market.title: Market catalog
market.body: Primary screen: RTK Query list, optional pagination, header plus for add-item modal, cart with badge, profile, and settings.

addMarketItem.title: Add market item
addMarketItem.body: Modal for creating catalog rows via POST /api/markets. Requirements are listed below.

shoppingList.title: Shopping list
shoppingList.body: Manage the cart, show a running total and checkout, and respect wallet balance from the userWallet slice.

profile.title: Profile
profile.body: Show money remaining and past checkouts from userWallet. Checkout is initiated from the shopping list.

settings.title: Settings
settings.body: Switch theme via the theme slice and language via i18n + the language slice. English is the default locale.
